subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Forgiving One! We are a scattered band; we are Thine, though we be strangers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا آمرزگارا جمعی هستيم پريشان تو هستيم هر چند بيگانه ايم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
